metadata.description: Garry's Stack — headless browser, QA testing, shipping, code review, retros, and plan review skills for Claude Code

plugins.name: browse
plugins.description: Fast headless browser for QA testing and site dogfooding. Navigate any URL, interact with elements, verify page state, diff before/after actions, take annotated screenshots, check responsive layouts, test forms and uploads, handle dialogs, and assert element states.

plugins.name: qa
plugins.description: Systematically QA test a web application with full, quick, and regression modes. Produces structured report with health score, screenshots, and repro steps.

plugins.name: setup-browser-cookies
plugins.description: Import cookies from your real browser (Chrome, Arc, Brave, Edge) into the headless browse session for testing authenticated pages.

plugins.name: ship
plugins.description: Ship workflow: merge main, run tests, review diff, bump version, update changelog, commit, push, create PR.

plugins.name: review
plugins.description: Pre-landing PR review. Analyzes diff against main for SQL safety, LLM trust boundary violations, conditional side effects, and other structural issues.

plugins.name: plan-ceo-review
plugins.description: CEO/founder-mode plan review. Rethink the problem, find the 10-star product, challenge premises, expand scope when it creates a better product.

plugins.name: plan-eng-review
plugins.description: Eng manager-mode plan review. Lock in the execution plan — architecture, data flow, diagrams, edge cases, test coverage, performance.

plugins.name: retro
plugins.description: Weekly engineering retrospective. Analyzes commit history, work patterns, and code quality metrics with persistent history and trend tracking.
